arms_mandatory_baselines: gloss-text-self-verify-retry-at-matched-budget (strongest ACTIVE text baseline — the arm Law 2 predicts will win; RT-2)

dependent_vars.definition: per-item error-catch indicator by arm and error class
dependent_vars.name: item_error_caught

dependent_vars.definition: task + kernel-covered-slice accuracy (full metric vector V, F0 accounting)
dependent_vars.name: accuracy

dependent_vars.definition: total-system peak ledger per F0 §3.4 (V component)
dependent_vars.name: memory

dependent_vars.definition: FLOPs/query, p50/p95 latency, usd/query per F0 §3.3 — verifier NN-cleanup |lexicon|·D MACs on the ledger (V component)
dependent_vars.name: inference_compute

n_planned.rung_set_claim: HC1 rung set declared at freeze: {R1, R2}; extension predicate: primary_reject@R1 AND primary_reject@R2 -> R3 (strengthen-only, RT-12)
n_planned.scoring: non-LLM rubric or leak-checked judge (E5 discipline; P7 RT-17 second-provider check deferred minor)

endpoints.test: paired bootstrap over items on the per-item caught/corrected rate vs the gloss arms, one-sided α=0.05, minimum effect Cohen's h=0.2; a null verdict requires TOST at margin h=0.2

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: P1 §4b row HC1 (verbatim): Measured range: 135M–360M (R3 iff the frozen extension predicate fires; rung-set discipline). Envelope: ≤3B, direction-only; bias stated: hosts' raw error rates fall with scale (loss scaling, Kaplan/Hoffmann), so absolute catch counts shrink; the *relative* catch on kernel-covered slices is the quantity extrapolated. Anchor: Law 2 (L3): text arms improve with scale — verifier lift must be re-measured, never assumed, above 3B (that is HC5's job).
kill_criterion_verbatim: P1 §2 HC1 kill criterion (verbatim): 'HC1 is dead at a rung if arm 4/5's error-catch set is ≥90% covered by arm 3's at ≤ arm 3's cost, or if end-task accuracy after repair does not exceed arm 3's by the pre-registered smallest effect of interest (Cohen's h = 0.2 on the per-item caught/corrected rate; paired bootstrap over items, α=0.05; a null verdict requires TOST with equivalence margin h = 0.2), or if arm 4/5 fails to beat arm 6 (gloss-text self-verify + retry) at matched retry budget and FLOPs by the same smallest effect (h = 0.2; same test; null requires TOST) — beating only arms that lack the retry loop attributes the win to verification-with-retry as such, not to the kernel, and is a FAIL. Ships with the per-class breakdown: any HC1 PASS must name the error classes only structure catches.'

corpus_hashes._recipe: sha256 over the sorted concatenation of '<relpath>:<file-sha256>\n' lines for every file under data/<corpus>/

runner_constraints.note: post-F2 infrastructure decision deferred by the maintainer at GNG-0; these pins are set by ops amendment or at this record's own freeze

title: E9-full — decode-verify vs RAG-with-citations, gloss dictionary, and gloss-text self-verify+retry (HC1; arms 1-6 per P1 HC1 incl. P7 RT-2 arm 6; P10 iface gate; rungs R1,R2 + frozen extension predicate for R3)
